message: Hey %player%, did you hear about the new student who just transferred?
Yeah, I heard. Do you know anything about them?
Not much, just that they moved here from a different city.
I saw them in the hallway earlier. They seemed a bit nervous.
I remember feeling the same way when I was new here.
It's always tough being the new kid. How did you all handle it when you were new?

options.text: I tried to make friends as quickly as possible.
I focused on my studies until I got more comfortable.
